Item Name: Roastesso, Aluminum Espresso Capsules, French Vanilla Natural Flavored Coffee, Compatible with Nespresso Original Machines, Medium Roast Intensity 7, Recyclable Coffee Pods, Packed in USA (40 Count) Bullet Point 1: NATURAL FRENCH VANILLA: Discover our unique fusion of smooth flavored coffee capsules, enriched with the mellow essence of natural French Vanilla. With a velvety aroma that enchants flavor enthusiasts and a rich, creamy taste, this coffee offers an effortlessly enjoyable experience in every sip. Bullet Point 2: ALUMINUM CAPSULES: Our new recyclable 100% aluminum capsules are designed to lock in maximum freshness, preserving the rich aroma and full-bodied flavor of each coffee pod. Built for a seamless fit with Nespresso Original machines, ensuring optimal extraction. Bullet Point 3: ROASTED AND PACKED IN THE USA: Proudly roasted and packed in the USA by our family-owned business, established in 2017. Each batch is roasted in small quantities to ensure exceptional quality and bold, fresh flavors in every cup. Bullet Point 4: COMPATIBLE WITH NESPRESSO ORIGINAL MACHINES: Enjoy flawless compatibility with all Nespresso OriginalLine brewers, including Breville, Delonghi, Inissia, and Pixie. Each pod delivers the perfect shot of espresso with smooth crema and bold taste. Bullet Point 5: ECO-FRIENDLY & RECYCLABLE: Crafted from 80% recyclable aluminum mono-material and CO2 neutral accreditation, our capsules offer an eco-conscious solution for espresso lovers who care about reducing waste while enjoying premium coffee. Product Description:

NATURAL FLAVORED FRENCH VANILLA ESPRESSO

Our flavored espresso coffee capsules are infused with only 100% Natural French Vanilla flavoring extracts without Diacetyl and No Artificial Flavors.  

AROMATIC PROFILE

The deliciously mellow French vanilla flavor brings a velvety layer to this coffee aroma to delight all flavor lovers featuring a rich and creamy taste that is easy to enjoy. Perfect Barista Creations for Sweet and Smooth Recipes with Milk.

ORIGIN

Enjoy our 100% Arabica coffee beans signature blend of South and Central America, known for its smooth taste and malted cereal notes. 

ROASTING

Roasted to medium with mild intensity. Individually roasted in small-batches to highlight the unique and distinct characteristics of each bean.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Graza, Drizzle & Sizzle Extra Virgin Olive Oil, 28.7 Fl Oz
Bullet Point 1: Start Sizzlin’ and Drizzlin’ in Your Kitchen: Graza’s Sizzle & Drizzle Small Duo Pack comes with a 500ml squeezable bottle of Sizzle Extra Virgin cooking oil and a 350ml squeezable bottle of Drizzle Extra Virgin finishing oil. 2-pack.
Bullet Point 2: Sizzle Extra Virgin Olive Oil: An olive oil for cooking made from mature, mid-season olives that yield a more mellow flavor. Sizzle was born for the heat. 1 bottle / 500mL.
Bullet Point 3: Use It Every Day, In Every Way: Because of its mellow flavor and high smoke point, Sizzle can be used in a lot of different ways. Sizzle is great for everyday cooking like roasting, searing, poaching, pan frying, baking, and marinating.
Bullet Point 4: Drizzle Extra Virgin Olive Oil: A 100% extra virgin finishing oil made from olives that are picked early when flavor is bold and antioxidants are highest. Drizzle adds a big pop of flavor right before you dig in. 1 bottle / 350ml.
Bullet Point 5: Made for Eating, Not Heating: Drizzle’s flavors are sensitive, so keep it off the heat! Instead, use Drizzle EVOO when you want your olive oil to steal the show.
Bullet Point 6: No Blending, No Funny Business: We use single origin picual olives from Jaen, Spain. Olives are harvested and then cold-pressed ASAP. Others make claims, but Graza is the real deal.
Bullet Point 7: About Graza: Made for anyone who cooks. Every kitchen deserves good, fresh olive oil that’s affordable enough to be used every day. Our single origin oils do just that, and they come in a squeezy bottle that makes everything easier and more fun. Use them every day, in every way.
Product Description: Start Sizzlin’ and Drizzlin’ in Your Kitchen: Graza’s Sizzle & Drizzle Small Duo Pack comes with a 500ml squeezable bottle of Sizzle Extra Virgin cooking oil and a 350ml squeezable bottle of Drizzle Extra Virgin finishing oil. 2-pack.

The bundle includes a cooking oil (Sizzle) and a finishing oil (Drizzle), both made from Picual olives from Jaen, Spain. The squeezable bottles and high-quality positioning suggest a mid-to-high price range, targeting everyday use in cooking and finishing dishes.

Place 1 teabag for each desired cup into the teapot. Pour the boiling water into the pot, cover and let steep for 2-4 minutes. Pour into your cup; add milk and natural sweeteners to taste. - Iced tea brewing method: (to make 1 liter/quart): Place 5 teabags into a teapot or heat resistant pitcher. Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the teabags. Steep for 5 minutes. Quarter fill a serving pitcher with cold water. Pour the tea into the serving pitcher. Add ice and top-up with cold water.
